col_4: These are vehicles, stored in or on the ship.
These are all small craft, hangered either in or on the ship’s hull.
he Fighter is a short-range combat vessel primarily used in system defense and large scale naval engagements
he Launch is designed to provide basic transportation needs, and is sometimes used as a lifeboat in the event of emergencies in deep space
the Pinnace primarily serves as cargo transport on an interplanetary scale
the Ship's Boat is a general-purpose small craft designed to cover a range of tasks
the Shuttle provides significantly more cargo transport capacity than the less expensive pinnace, at the cost of slower performance

This covers the installation of rescue bubbles and other escape pods for the entire crew.
Each set of mining drones takes up ten tons, and allows the ship to process 1D6x10 tons of asteroid per working day. The tonn

Probe drones are for surveying planetary surfaces. Each ton of probe drones contains five drones. Probe drones can be dropped from orbit in disposable entry shells but must be recovered manually. Probe drones are also capable of surveying orbiting satellites, derelicts and other space debris. They can also be used as communications relays.
